name: testops-companion
description: A comprehensive test automation management platform

scripts.setup: npm run setup:clean && npm run setup:install && npm run setup:env && npm run setup:db
scripts.setup:install: npm install && npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:backend
scripts.setup:db: npm run db:start && npm run db:wait && npm run db:init
scripts.db:init: npm run db:migrate && (npm run db:seed || (echo 'Retrying seed after error...' && npm run db:seed))
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.security:audit: npm audit && cd frontend && npm audit && cd ../backend && npm audit
scripts.security:fix: npm audit fix && cd frontend && npm audit fix && cd ../backend && npm audit fix
scripts.update:deps: npm run update:deps:root && npm run update:deps:frontend && npm run update:deps:backend

author: Rotem Ayalon <rayalon@gmail.com>
